jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Extramarks - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Extramarks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Extramarks:
Extramarks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks!
